title: Update Content Security Policy for Pendo Integration
description:
The application's Content Security Policy (CSP) needs additional directives to fully support Pendo analytics and in-app guides. Pendo's documentation outlines the required CSP sources.

The key addition is the `pendo-static-{SUB_ID}.storage.googleapis.com` directive, which requires the Pendo subscription ID to construct the correct domain.

### Reference
- Pendo CSP guide: https://support.pendo.io/hc/en-us/articles/360032209131-Content-Security-Policy-CSP
acceptance_criteria: All CSP directives listed in the Pendo CSP guide are added to the application's custom CSP
The pendo-static storage directive uses the correct subscription ID
Pendo analytics and in-app guides load without CSP violations
No regressions in other CSP-protected resources
implementation_notes: All Pendo-required CSP directives were added to the custom CSP header. The subscription ID (6474377860546560) was needed for the pendo-static Google Cloud Storage directive. Changes deployed and verified on staging.
comment_summary: Developer added all Pendo CSP directives except the subscription-specific one, which required the Pendo sub ID. After receiving the ID, all directives were added and pushed to staging for review.
